name: Jordan Rivera
resume_text:
Jordan Rivera
jordan.rivera@email.com | (555) 123-4567 | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/jordanrivera

Objective
Recent cybersecurity graduate seeking an entry-level SOC Analyst position to leverage my academic training in network security, threat detection, and incident response. Passionate about protecting organizations from cyber threats.

Education
Bachelor of Science in Cybersecurity, University of Maryland, May 2025
GPA: 3.7/4.0 | Dean's List (6 semesters) | CyberPatriot Competition Finalist

Certifications
CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701), Earned March 2025
Splunk Core Certified User, Earned January 2025

Technical Skills
SIEM: Splunk (log analysis, dashboard creation, SPL queries)
Network Tools: Wireshark, Nmap, TCPDump, Netcat
Operating Systems: Linux (Ubuntu, Kali Linux), Windows 10/11, Windows Server 2019
Programming: Python (scripting, automation), Bash, SQL
Security: Vulnerability scanning with Nessus, basic Metasploit usage, firewall configuration
Networking: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLANs, subnetting, VPN fundamentals

Projects
Home SOC Lab (Personal Project)
Built a home lab environment using VirtualBox with Security Onion, Splunk Free, and multiple Windows and Linux VMs. Configured log forwarding, created detection rules for common attacks, and practiced incident investigation workflows. Analyzed over 500 simulated security events.

Capstone: Network Intrusion Detection System
Developed a Python-based network traffic analyzer that identified suspicious patterns using Scapy and integrated alerts with a Splunk dashboard. Achieved 92% detection rate on test dataset of known attack signatures.

Experience
IT Help Desk Intern, TechCorp Solutions, June 2024 - August 2024
Provided Tier 1 technical support for 200+ employees. Resolved Active Directory account issues, managed Windows workstation configurations, and documented troubleshooting procedures. Assisted the security team with phishing email analysis during a simulated incident exercise.

Activities
Cybersecurity Club Vice President | National Cyber League (NCL) participant, top 15% nationally | TryHackMe: Top 5% ranking

name: Priya Sharma

- Implemented comprehensive test suites using Jest and Cypress, increasing code coverage from 45% to 85%
- Collaborated with product and design teams in agile sprints using JIRA and Confluence
- Set up CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions with automated testing, linting, and deployment to AWS ECS

Junior Software Developer, WebWorks Inc., Austin, TX, June 2021 - February 2023

Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, University of Texas at Austin, May 2021

name: Marcus Chen
resume_text:
Marcus Chen
marcus.chen@email.com | (555) 345-6789 | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/marcuschen

Summary
Cloud and DevOps engineer with 5 years of experience designing, building, and managing infrastructure on AWS and Azure. Expert in infrastructure as code, container orchestration, and CI/CD pipeline automation. AWS Certified Solutions Architect and Certified Kubernetes Administrator.

Experience

Senior DevOps Engineer, CloudScale Solutions, Seattle, WA, January 2023 - Present
- Architect and maintain multi-region AWS infrastructure serving 2M+ daily active users across 15 microservices
- Manage production Kubernetes clusters (EKS) with 200+ pods, implementing auto-scaling, RBAC, and network policies
- Developed Terraform modules for standardized infrastructure provisioning, reducing environment setup time from days to 30 minutes
- Implemented comprehensive observability stack using Prometheus, Grafana, and Datadog with custom alerting
- Led migration from Jenkins to GitHub Actions, consolidating 40+ CI/CD pipelines and reducing build times by 50%
- Configured Istio service mesh for inter-service communication with mTLS encryption
- Managed infrastructure costs, achieving 30% reduction through right-sizing and reserved instance planning

Cloud Engineer, InfraWorks Inc., Portland, OR, August 2020 - December 2022
- Deployed and managed AWS services including EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, VPC, IAM, CloudWatch, and Route 53
- Automated server provisioning and configuration using Ansible and Packer
- Implemented ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) for centralized logging across 50+ services
- Managed Azure DevOps pipelines for .NET application deployments
- Configured HAProxy and Nginx load balancers for high-availability web services
- Wrote Python and Bash scripts for infrastructure automation and monitoring

Junior Systems Administrator, TechOps Corp., Portland, OR, June 2019 - July 2020
- Administered Linux (Ubuntu, CentOS) and Windows Server environments
- Managed Active Directory, Group Policy, and VMware vSphere clusters
- Monitored infrastructure health using Nagios and resolved incidents during on-call rotations

Education
Bachelor of Science in Information Technology, Oregon State University, June 2019

Certifications
AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate | Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) | HashiCorp Terraform Associate

Technical Skills
Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, VPC, IAM, EKS, ECS, CloudWatch, Route 53, CloudFormation), Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps
Containers: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, Istio, Rancher
IaC: Terraform, Ansible, Packer, CloudFormation, Pulumi
CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, ArgoCD
Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, ELK Stack, Nagios
Networking: TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, Load Balancing, Nginx, HAProxy
OS: Linux (Ubuntu, CentOS, Alpine), Windows Server, VMware vSphere
Languages: Python, Bash, Go, YAML, JSON

name: Aisha Okonkwo
resume_text:
Aisha Okonkwo
aisha.okonkwo@email.com | (555) 456-7890 | GitHub: github.com/aokonkwo | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/aishaokonkwo

Summary
Data scientist with 3 years of experience applying machine learning and statistical analysis to solve complex business problems. Skilled in building predictive models, designing experiments, and communicating insights to non-technical stakeholders. Published researcher in applied NLP.

Experience

Data Scientist, PredictiveEdge Analytics, New York, NY, April 2023 - Present
- Built customer churn prediction model using XGBoost and LightGBM, reducing churn by 18% through targeted interventions
- Developed NLP pipeline for automated support ticket classification using Hugging Face transformers and SpaCy, achieving 94% accuracy
- Designed and analyzed A/B tests for product features, providing statistical recommendations that increased conversion by 12%
- Created interactive Tableau dashboards for executive reporting on key business metrics
- Implemented RAG-based chatbot using LangChain, OpenAI API, and Elasticsearch for internal knowledge base search
- Deployed ML models to production using Docker, FastAPI, and AWS SageMaker with MLflow experiment tracking

Junior Data Analyst, DataFirst Corp., Boston, MA, July 2021 - March 2023
- Performed exploratory data analysis using Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn) to identify business trends
- Built automated ETL pipelines using Apache Airflow and SQL to process 10M+ records daily
- Created Power BI dashboards for sales, marketing, and operations teams
- Developed time series forecasting models for demand planning using Prophet and ARIMA
- Wrote complex SQL queries against Snowflake data warehouse for ad-hoc analysis

Research Assistant, MIT Media Lab, Cambridge, MA, September 2020 - June 2021
- Conducted research on sentiment analysis of social media data using BERT and GPT-2 fine-tuning
- Co-authored paper published at ACL Workshop on NLP applications in public health
- Processed large-scale text datasets using Apache Spark and NLTK

Education
Master of Science in Data Science, MIT, June 2021
Bachelor of Science in Mathematics, Howard University, May 2019

Technical Skills
Languages: Python, SQL, R
ML/AI: Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, XGBoost, LightGBM, Hugging Face, LangChain
NLP: SpaCy, NLTK, BERT, GPT, Transformers, RAG, Prompt Engineering
Data: Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Apache Spark, Apache Airflow
Visualization: Tableau, Power BI, Matplotlib, Seaborn
Databases: Snowflake, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, MongoDB
Tools: Docker, AWS SageMaker, MLflow, Jupyter, FastAPI, Git
Statistics: Hypothesis testing, A/B testing, Bayesian inference, Time Series Analysis
